da.urgency_banner: Efterårsholdet starter 10. august 2026 — åben for tilmelding. Sikr din plads nu.
da.urgency_inline: Næste hold · August–December 2026 · Åben for tilmelding
da.hero_subtitle: Bliv certificeret yogalærer ved siden af dit job, studie eller familieliv
da.hero_styles: Hatha · Vinyasa · Yin · Hot Yoga & Meditation
da.curr_subtitle: Et komplet 200-timers curriculum der giver dig alt, du skal bruge som yogalærer.
da.curr1_desc: Hatha, Vinyasa og Yin fundamentals. Stillinger, modificationer, props og sekvensering for alle niveauer.
da.curr2_desc: Muskulatur, skeletstruktur, bevægelsesmekanik og skadesforebyggelse. Praktisk anvendt i din undervisning.
da.curr3_desc: Klasseopbygning, cueing, stemmetræning, hands-on assists og hvordan du skaber en tryg atmosfære.
da.curr4_desc: Yoga Sutras, Bhagavad Gita, de 8 lemmer, chakras og yogaens udvikling fra oldtid til nutid.
da.curr5_desc: Åndedrætsteknikker, bandhas, meditationsformer og integration i dine klasser.
da.curr6_desc: Karrierestart, business basics, markedsføring, etik og livslang faglig udvikling.
da.video_subtitle: Hør direkte fra vores studerende, hvad uddannelsen har betydet for dem.
da.cert_subtitle: En globalt anerkendt certificering, der åbner døre — uanset om du vil undervise i København, på Bali eller online fra din stue.
da.cert_style1_desc: Den klassiske form — både statisk og dynamisk. Styrker balance, fokus, fleksibilitet og koncentration. Grundlaget for al yogaundervisning.
da.cert_style2_desc: Dynamisk, kreativt og fysisk udfordrende. Verdens mest populære yogastil — og den mest efterspurgte i studier og fitnesscentre.
da.cert_style3_desc: Lange stræk, dyb restitution og fleksibilitet. Idéel til at komplementere dynamiske stilarter og guide elever i ro og tålmodighed.
da.cert_style4_desc: Undervis i opvarmet miljø. Du lærer forskellen på heated og non-heated undervisning — og kan certificere dig i begge.
da.cert_style5_desc: Guide dine elever sikkert gennem meditation og åndedrætsøvelser — en uundværlig del af professionel yogaundervisning.
da.cert_door1: Undervis over hele verden — certificeringen er anerkendt internationalt, så du kan undervise mens du rejser eller hvis du flytter til et andet land.
da.cert_door2: Start dit eget studie — med RYT-200 kan du oprette dine egne klasser, workshops og kurser med troværdighed og kvalitetsstempel bag dig.
da.cert_door3: Certificér andre i fremtiden — med erfaring kan du oprette din egen skole via Yoga Alliance USA og uddanne kommende yogalærere.
da.cert_door4: Videreuddannelse — fortsæt til 300-timers avanceret program og bliv RYT-500 certificeret for endnu flere muligheder.
da.cert_door5: Bred karriereadgang — fra yogastudier og fitnesscentre til corporate wellness, retreats og online undervisning. Denne certificering favner det hele.
da.cert_closing: Certificeringen er bred og alligevel dybt professionel — den giver dig en solid base til at undervise enhver yogastil og åbner karrieremuligheder du måske ikke havde forestillet dig.
da.certval_title: Mere end et certifikat — en livslang investering
da.certval_intro: RYT-200 er indgangen til yogaundervisning på alle niveauer. En certificering, der forandrer både din praksis og dit perspektiv — personligt og professionelt.
da.certval_learn1: Undervis i verdens mest populære og grundlæggende yogastile — Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga og Meditation
da.certval_learn2: Menneskekroppens anatomi og fysiologi — forstå bevægelse, muskler og skeletstruktur
da.certval_learn3: Yogafilosofi og meditationsteknikker — fra de klassiske tekster til moderne anvendelse
da.certval_learn4: Forbedr din egen praksis, undgå skader og lær at hele eksisterende ubalancer
da.certval_learn5: Personlig transformation og professionel udvikling — en investering i noget meningsfuldt
da.certval_upgrade_text: Din RYT-200 er fundamentet. Derfra kan du udvide med målrettede kurser (Inversions, Splits, Backbends) eller tage det fulde spring med vores 300-timers Advanced Teacher Training til RYT-500.
da.certval_exam_text: Du demonstrerer dine færdigheder ved at undervise op til 20 minutters sekvenser i hver stil for dit hold. Derudover skal du bestå tests og quizzer i anatomi og yogafilosofi. Ingen overraskelser — vi forbereder dig grundigt.
da.certval_image_alt: Eksempel på Yoga Alliance RYT-200 certificering
da.flex_subtitle: Vi er formentlig den eneste skole i verden, der kører uddannelsen i to formater samtidig — hverdag og weekend. Det giver dig maksimal fleksibilitet, og du kan frit skifte mellem datoerne.
da.flex1_desc: Kan du ikke en hverdag? Tag en weekenddag i stedet. Du er ikke låst til ét spor.
da.flex2_desc: Begge formater dækker præcis det samme pensum og giver samme Yoga Alliance certificering.
da.flex3_desc: Små hold (ca. 12 per kursus) betyder personlig opmærksomhed, tæt community og 90%+ gennemførelsesrate.
da.tracks_subtitle: Skift mellem sporene når du har brug for det
da.tracks_lead: Hver workshop kører to gange: én på udvalgte hverdage og én på udvalgte weekender. Vælg dit standardspor — byt frit når det passer bedre.
da.tracks_weekday_desc: Kører på udvalgte hverdage. Perfekt hvis du har fleksible arbejdstider eller mulighed for fri.
da.tracks_weekend_desc: Kører på udvalgte weekender. Ideelt hvis du arbejder fuldtid i hverdagene.
da.tracks_flex_desc: Kan du ikke komme? Deltag i spejl-workshoppen i det andet spor — samme emne, samme underviser.
da.tracks_video_caption: Kort video: Sådan fungerer Hverdags- & Weekendspor
da.tracks_point1: Samme workshop udbydes to gange — én gang i hvert spor
da.tracks_point2: Skift holder dig på sporet, når livet sker
da.tracks_point3: Små øvehold for tæt og personlig feedback
da.scenario1_text: Vælg weekendsporet. Skift til en hverdag, hvis du får mulighed.
da.scenario2_text: Vælg hverdagssporet og hop til en weekend, når kalenderen driller.
da.tracks_faq1_q: Skal jeg give besked, før jeg skifter?
da.tracks_faq1_a: Nej — du har adgang til alle workshopdatoer i begge spor og kan frit møde op til dem, der passer dig bedst.
da.tracks_faq2_q: Misser jeg noget ved at skifte?
da.tracks_faq2_a: Nej. Spejl-sessionen har samme emne, underviser og struktur.
da.tracks_faq3_q: Er der workshops hver uge / weekend?
da.tracks_faq3_a: Nej. Vi planlægger udvalgte hverdage og weekender, og nogle perioder er helt fri.
da.tracks_cta_hint: Vil du se de præcise datoer?
da.journey_desc: Fra forberedelse til certificering — her er hvordan dit 18-ugers forløb udfolder sig.
da.journey1_desc: Sikr din plads og start med at deltage i klasser. Brug tiden til at opbygge styrke, fleksibilitet og daglig rutine.
da.journey2_desc: Hatha yoga, funktionel anatomi og yogafilosofi. Du lærer grundlæggende stillinger, alignment og kroppens bevægelsesmønstre.
da.journey3_desc: Vinyasa flow, Yin yoga og kreativ sequencing. Du begynder at designe dine egne klasser og finde din underviser-stemme.
da.journey4_desc: Klasseledelse, psykologi og supervised teaching. Du underviser dine medstuderende og modtager struktureret feedback.
da.journey5_desc: Afsluttende assessment, portfolio og certificering. Du modtager din Yoga Alliance RYT-200 og er klar til at undervise.
da.testimonial_quote:
Jeg kan varmt anbefale at tage yogalæreruddannelsen hos Yoga Bible. Underviserne er super dygtige, og de formår at skabe et trygt rum at lære i. Uddannelsen er fleksibel — du kan vælge hverdag eller weekend, og du kan skifte mellem hold.

Jeg har fået alle de rette værktøjer til at kunne undervise efter endt uddannelse. Min varmeste anbefaling.
da.invest_incl3: Praksis i virkelige omgivelser — yogastudio, hot yoga & Vibro Yoga
da.invest_deposit_note: Forberedelsesfasen på 3.750 kr. er inkluderet i den samlede pris. Restbeløb: 20.000 kr.
da.invest_early_title: Ansøg tidligt — få adgang til studiet med det samme
da.invest_early_desc: Start forberedelsesfasen og begynd at booke klasser hos Hot Yoga Copenhagen i Christianshavn. 30+ klasser om ugen i Hot Yoga, Vinyasa, Yin og mere.
da.early_title: Start forberedelsesfasen og få tidlig adgang til studiet
da.early2: Brug forberedelsesfasen til at booke klasser med det samme
da.early3: Bliv klar — krop og sind — før uddannelsen starter
da.early_cta: Start forberedelsesfasen og begynd at booke
da.early_refund_note: Giv os besked hurtigst muligt ved afmelding.
da.early_installment: Resten kan betales i op til 5 rater inden august 2026
da.early_img_alt: Rolig yogasal i København med måtter og varmt lys
da.reviews_lead: Uddannelsen har hjulpet 500+ elever videre — nogle fordyber egen praksis, andre underviser ved siden af et hovedjob, og flere er gået heltidsvejen med egne studier og retreats.

reviews.name: Tanja E.
reviews.text: Varmt, venligt miljø og kompetente lærere. God balance mellem praksis og den filosofiske del – stærk forståelse for anatomi.

reviews.name: Sara Gerlee
reviews.text: 200-timers forløb var transformerende. Vidende og støttende team – studiet føles som et andet hjem, for både nye og erfarne.

reviews.name: Clara Aagaard
reviews.text: Holistisk læringsmiljø med plads til spørgsmål og praksisfokus. Dygtige undervisere og anvendelige værktøjer til klasseledelse.

reviews.name: Liza Westh
reviews.text: Min varmeste anbefaling. 200 timer i class management, anatomi og praksis – følte mig optimalt forberedt som yogalærer.

reviews.name: Signe Schmidt
reviews.text: Effektiv 18-ugers uddannelse i anatomi, filosofi og praksis (yin, vinyasa, hatha) – i en smuk sal med dagslys og grønne planter.

reviews.name: Meg Ellis
reviews.text: Ekstraordinært studie og lærerteam. 200t forløb forbereder dig fuldt — perfekt til både fordybelse og undervisning.

reviews.name: Kama Krystel
reviews.text: Velstruktureret intensivt forløb, der blander teori og praksis. Personlig feedback og støttende community – kan varmt anbefales.

reviews.name: Giorgianna G.
reviews.text: Udfordrende og belønnende. Unikt fokus på class management. Fem stjerner for de dygtige lærere og forberedelse til at undervise.

reviews.name: Helena Bend...
reviews.text: Kan virkelig anbefale uddannelsen – 5 lærerige måneder. Jeg føler mig godt klædt på til at fortsætte som yogalærer.

reviews.name: Tonje Follum
reviews.text: Inspiration, stor detaljegrad og varmt miljø. Fantastisk atmosfære med planter, lys og musik – mit yndlings-yogafællesskab.

reviews.name: Ping Li
reviews.text: Afsluttede netop min 200t – stor mental & fysisk udvikling. Dybt professionelt team. Meget glad for min rejse her.

reviews.name: Camilla Rend...
reviews.text: Nyuddannet instruktør – føler mig klar i hatha, vinyasa og yin. Hårdt arbejde, men det værd. Anbefales til både udøvere og kommende instruktører.

reviews.name: Dagmar Eliza...
reviews.text: Bredt udbud af klasser + mulighed for YTT. Dygtige undervisere i anatomi & filosofi. Lærte meget og fandt et stærkt fællesskab.

reviews.name: Yasmine Olof...
reviews.text: Fantastisk uddannelse! Føler mig klar til at lede egne klasser. Varme, professionelle undervisere og hyggeligt studie.

reviews.name: Anastasia Se...
reviews.text: Vidunderligt sted at praktisere. 5-måneders YTT var informativt og professionelt – lærerne støtter dig hele vejen.

reviews.name: Maja Pedersen
reviews.text: Pragmatisk tilgang – man udvikler sig hurtigt. Super undervisere med stor erfaring i Hatha/Vinyasa, anatomi og yogafilosofi.

da.visit_title: Book et gratis infomøde i Christianshavn
da.visit_lead: Kom forbi og få en følelse af stedet — vi fortæller om uddannelsen, svarer på spørgsmål og hjælper dig med at se, hvordan den kan passe i din hverdag. Infomødet tager ca. 20 minutter.
da.visit1: Se lokaler, udstyr og roen i huset
da.visit3: Få en klar plan for næste skridt
da.visit_note: Bor du ikke i København? Vi kan også holde et kort online infomøde via WhatsApp eller FaceTime.
da.visit_img1_alt: Yogasal med varmt trægulv og måtter
da.visit_modal_subtitle: Vælg en dato og et tidspunkt der passer dig.
da.faq1_q: Skal jeg have erfaring for at starte?
da.faq1_a: Du bør have minimum 6–12 måneders regelmæssig yogapraksis (2–3 gange om ugen). Du skal være fortrolig med basale stillinger og kunne holde en 60-minutters klasse.
da.faq2_q: Hvad er forskellen på hverdags- og weekendforløb?
da.faq2_a: Indholdet og certificeringen er identisk. Hverdagsforløbet kører 1–3 dage om ugen kl. 10–15, mens weekendforløbet primært er udvalgte weekender kl. 13–18. Du kan frit skifte mellem datoerne.
da.faq3_q: Kan jeg arbejde eller studere samtidig?
da.faq3_a: Ja, uddannelsen er designet til det. Mange af vores studerende arbejder fuldtid eller studerer. Regn med 15–20 timer om ugen inkl. undervisning, hjemmeopgaver og egen praksis.
da.faq4_a: Ja, vi er en registreret Yoga Alliance skole (RYS-200). Du modtager RYT-200 certificering efter graduation — anerkendt globalt.
da.faq5_q: Hvad sker der, hvis jeg bliver syg?
da.faq5_a: Du må maks. misse 10% af timerne. Vi tilbyder make-up sessions, og du kan eventuelt færdiggøre i næste hold hvis nødvendigt.
da.faq6_a: Ja — praktisk undervisningsprøve, skriftlig anatomi-test og filosofi-aflevering. Alt er designet til læring, ikke stress. Vi har 90%+ beståelsesrate.
da.final_title: Klar til at starte din rejse?
da.final_text: Næste 18-ugers hold starter 10. august 2026 — åben for tilmelding nu. Start forberedelsesfasen og begynd at deltage i klasser med det samme.
da.more_lead: Hos Yoga Bible tilbyder vi forløb, der hjælper dig videre i din praksis – fra målrettede kursusforløb til fleksible læreruddannelser.
da.more_courses_text: Vi afholder hver måned fokuserede 4-ugers forløb pakket som 8 × 90 minutters workshops (to gange om ugen) – til en rimelig pris og designet til alle, der vil fordybe deres praksis trin for trin.
da.course_inv_blurb: Lær at arbejde sikkert med håndstande, underarmsbalancer og hovedstande – teknik, styrke og mod.
da.course_spl_blurb: Smidighed med system – hofteåbnere, baglår og teknik til front & middle splits uden at presse kroppen.
da.course_bb_blurb: Sunde bagoverbøjninger med fokus på åndedræt, stabilitet og gradvis mobilitet i brystryg og hofter.
da.prog4w_blurb: Samme Yoga Alliance–certificerede uddannelse – komprimeret til 4 uger. To hold: Complete Program (april) og Vinyasa Plus (juli).
da.prog4w_list1: April: Multi-style — Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga, Meditation
da.prog4w_list2: Juli: Vinyasa Plus — 70% Vinyasa Flow + Yin & Hot Yoga
da.prog8w_blurb: Samme Yoga Alliance–certificerede uddannelse – fordelt over 8 uger med et balanceret tempo, der giver plads til integration og hverdagsliv.
da.prog8w_list1: Flere dage om ugen med blandet teori og praksis
da.prog8w_list2: Tid til at fordøje stoffet mellem sessioner
da.cohort_subtitle: Vi kører to 18-ugers hold om året — forår og efterår. Samme uddannelse, samme certificering.
da.cohort_spring_proof_detail: De fleste startede med forberedelsesfasen uger før
da.cohort_spring_late_desc: Erfaren yogi eller allerede lærer? Tilmeld dig sent — skriv til os, så finder vi en løsning med rabat.
da.cohort_spring_workshop_desc: Alle workshops kan tages individuelt til 975 kr. pr. workshop. Se skemaet og book.
da.cohort_spring_ended: Forårholdet er afsluttet. Se vores næste hold herunder.
da.cohort_autumn_desc: 18 uger, hverdags- eller weekendhold. Start: 10. august · Graduation: 13. december 2026.

en.urgency_banner: The autumn cohort starts August 10, 2026 — open for enrollment. Secure your place now.
en.urgency_inline: Next cohort · August–December 2026 · Open for enrollment
en.hero_subtitle: Become a certified yoga teacher alongside your job, studies or family life
en.hero_styles: Hatha · Vinyasa · Yin · Hot Yoga & Meditation
en.hero_cta_more: Read details about our 200-hour yoga teacher training →
en.curr_subtitle: A complete 200-hour curriculum that gives you everything you need as a yoga teacher.
en.curr1_desc: Hatha, Vinyasa and Yin fundamentals. Postures, modifications, props and sequencing for all levels.
en.curr2_desc: Musculature, skeletal structure, biomechanics and injury prevention. Practically applied in your teaching.
en.curr3_desc: Class structure, cueing, voice training, hands-on assists and how to create a safe atmosphere.
en.curr4_desc: Yoga Sutras, Bhagavad Gita, the 8 limbs, chakras and the evolution of yoga from ancient to modern times.
en.curr5_desc: Breathing techniques, bandhas, meditation forms and integration into your classes.
en.curr6_desc: Career launch, business basics, marketing, ethics and lifelong professional development.
en.video_title: Experience the training from the inside
en.video_subtitle: Hear directly from our students what the training has meant to them.
en.cert_subtitle: A globally recognized certification that opens doors — whether you want to teach in Copenhagen, in Bali or online from your living room.
en.cert_style1_desc: The classical form — both static and dynamic. Builds balance, focus, flexibility and concentration. The foundation for all yoga teaching.
en.cert_style2_desc: Dynamic, creative and physically challenging. The world's most popular yoga style — and the most in-demand at studios and fitness centers.
en.cert_style3_desc: Long holds, deep restoration and flexibility. Ideal for complementing dynamic styles and guiding students in stillness and patience.
en.cert_style4_desc: Teach in a heated environment. You learn the difference between heated and non-heated teaching — and can certify in both.
en.cert_style5_desc: Guide your students safely through meditation and breathing exercises — an essential part of professional yoga teaching.
en.cert_door1: Teach worldwide — the certification is internationally recognized, so you can teach while traveling or if you move to another country.
en.cert_door2: Start your own studio — with RYT-200 you can create your own classes, workshops and courses with credibility and a quality seal behind you.
en.cert_door3: Certify others in the future — with experience you can establish your own school through Yoga Alliance USA and train future yoga teachers.
en.cert_door4: Further education — continue to the 300-hour advanced program and become RYT-500 certified for even more opportunities.
en.cert_door5: Broad career access — from yoga studios and fitness centers to corporate wellness, retreats and online teaching. This certification covers it all.
en.cert_closing: The certification is broad yet deeply professional — it gives you a solid foundation to teach any yoga style and opens career opportunities you may not have imagined.
en.certval_title: More than a certificate — a lifelong investment
en.certval_intro: RYT-200 is the entry point for yoga teaching at all levels. A certification that transforms both your practice and your perspective — personally and professionally.
en.certval_learn1: Teach the world's most popular and foundational yoga styles — Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga & Meditation
en.certval_learn2: Human anatomy and physiology — understand movement, muscles, and skeletal structure
en.certval_learn3: Yoga philosophy and meditation techniques — from classical texts to modern application
en.certval_learn4: Improve your own practice, avoid injuries, and learn to heal existing imbalances
en.certval_learn5: Personal transformation and professional development — an investment in something meaningful
en.certval_upgrade_text: Your RYT-200 is the foundation. From there, you can expand with targeted courses (Inversions, Splits, Backbends) or take the full leap with our 300-Hour Advanced Teacher Training towards RYT-500.
en.certval_exam_text: You'll demonstrate your skills by teaching up to 20-minute sequences in each style to your group. You'll also pass tests and quizzes on anatomy and yoga philosophy. No surprises — we prepare you thoroughly.
en.flex_subtitle: We are probably the only school in the world that runs the training in two formats simultaneously — weekday and weekend. This gives you maximum flexibility, and you can freely switch between dates.
en.flex1_desc: Cannot make a weekday? Take a weekend day instead. You are not locked into one track.
en.flex2_desc: Both formats cover exactly the same curriculum and provide the same Yoga Alliance certification.
en.flex3_desc: Small groups (approx. 12 per course) mean personal attention, close community and 90%+ completion rate.
en.tracks_subtitle: Switch between tracks when you need to
en.tracks_lead: Each workshop runs twice: once on selected weekdays and once on selected weekends. Choose your default track — switch freely when it suits you better.
en.tracks_weekday_desc: Runs on selected weekdays. Perfect if you have flexible working hours or the ability to take time off.
en.tracks_weekend_desc: Runs on selected weekends. Ideal if you work full time on weekdays.
en.tracks_flex_desc: Cannot make it? Join the mirror workshop in the other track — same topic, same instructor.
en.tracks_video_caption: Short video: How the Weekday & Weekend tracks work
en.tracks_point1: Same workshop offered twice — once in each track
en.tracks_point2: Switching keeps you on track when life happens
en.tracks_point3: Small practice groups for close and personal feedback
en.fallback_text: Join live online or watch the recording afterwards.
en.scenario1_text: Choose the weekend track. Switch to a weekday if you get the opportunity.
en.scenario2_text: Choose the weekday track and jump to a weekend when your calendar conflicts.
en.tracks_faq1_q: Do I need to notify you before switching?
en.tracks_faq1_a: No — you have access to all workshop dates in both tracks and can freely attend whichever ones suit you best.
en.tracks_faq2_q: Will I miss anything by switching?
en.tracks_faq2_a: No. The mirror session has the same topic, instructor and structure.
en.tracks_faq3_q: Are there workshops every week / weekend?
en.tracks_faq3_a: No. We schedule selected weekdays and weekends, and some periods are completely free.
en.tracks_cta_hint: Want to see the exact dates?
en.journey_desc: From preparation to certification — here's how your 18-week program unfolds.
en.journey1_desc: Secure your spot and begin attending classes. Use the time to build strength, flexibility and a daily routine.
en.journey2_desc: Hatha yoga, functional anatomy and yoga philosophy. Learn fundamental postures, alignment and how the body moves.
en.journey3_desc: Vinyasa flow, Yin yoga and creative sequencing. You begin designing your own classes and finding your teaching voice.
en.journey4_desc: Class management, psychology and supervised teaching. You teach your peers and receive structured feedback.
en.journey5_desc: Final assessment, portfolio and certification. You receive your Yoga Alliance RYT-200 and are ready to teach.
en.testimonial_quote:
I highly recommend taking your yoga training at Yoga Bible. The teachers are super skilled, and they manage to create a safe space to learn in. The course is flexible — you can choose a weekday or weekend class, and it is even possible to jump between classes.

I have been given all the right tools to be able to teach after completing the training. My warmest recommendation.
en.invest_incl3: Practice in real settings — yoga studio, hot yoga & Vibro Yoga
en.invest_deposit_note: The Preparation Phase fee of 3,750 DKK is included in the total price. Remaining: 20,000 DKK.
en.invest_early_title: Apply early — get studio access right away
en.invest_early_desc: Start the Preparation Phase and begin booking classes at Hot Yoga Copenhagen in Christianshavn. 30+ classes per week in Hot Yoga, Vinyasa, Yin and more.
en.early_title: Start the Preparation Phase and get early access to the studio
en.early1: Secure your spot on the training
en.early2: Use the Preparation Phase to book classes right away
en.early3: Get ready — body and mind — before the training starts
en.early4: Pre-fill self-practice hours towards your 200 hours
en.early_cta: Start Preparation Phase and begin booking
en.early_refund_note: Please let us know as soon as possible if you need to cancel.
en.early_installment: The rest can be paid in up to 5 installments before August 2026
en.early_img_alt: Calm yoga room in Copenhagen with mats and warm light
en.reviews_lead: The training has helped 500+ students move forward — some deepen their personal practice, others teach alongside their main job, and several have gone full time with their own studios and retreats.

reviews.name: Tanja E.
reviews.text: Warm, friendly environment and competent teachers. Great balance between practice and philosophy — strong understanding of anatomy.

reviews.name: Sara Gerlee
reviews.text: The 200-hour program was transformative. Knowledgeable and supportive team — the studio feels like a second home for both beginners and experienced practitioners.

reviews.name: Clara Aagaard
reviews.text: Holistic learning environment with room for questions and practice focus. Skilled teachers and useful tools for class management.

reviews.name: Liza Westh
reviews.text: My warmest recommendation. 200 hours in class management, anatomy and practice — felt optimally prepared as a yoga teacher.

reviews.name: Signe Schmidt
reviews.text: Effective 18-week training in anatomy, philosophy and practice (yin, vinyasa, hatha) — in a beautiful room with daylight and green plants.

reviews.name: Meg Ellis
reviews.text: Extraordinary studio and teaching team. The 200h program prepares you fully — perfect for both deepening and teaching.

reviews.name: Kama Krystel
reviews.text: Well-structured intensive program that blends theory and practice. Personal feedback and supportive community — highly recommended.

reviews.name: Giorgianna G.
reviews.text: Challenging and rewarding. Unique focus on class management. Five stars for the skilled teachers and preparation for teaching.

reviews.name: Helena Bend...
reviews.text: Can truly recommend the training — 5 educational months. I feel well equipped to continue as a yoga teacher.

reviews.name: Tonje Follum
reviews.text: Inspiration, great attention to detail and warm environment. Fantastic atmosphere with plants, light and music — my favorite yoga community.

reviews.name: Ping Li
reviews.text: Just finished my 200h — great mental & physical development. Deeply professional team. Very happy with my journey here.

reviews.name: Camilla Rend...
reviews.text: Newly graduated instructor — feel ready in hatha, vinyasa and yin. Hard work but worth it. Recommended for both practitioners and aspiring instructors.

reviews.name: Dagmar Eliza...
reviews.text: Wide range of classes + opportunity for YTT. Skilled teachers in anatomy & philosophy. Learned a lot and found a strong community.

reviews.name: Yasmine Olof...
reviews.text: Amazing training! Feel ready to lead my own classes. Warm, professional teachers and cozy studio.

reviews.name: Anastasia Se...
reviews.text: Wonderful place to practice. The 5-month YTT was informative and professional — the teachers support you all the way.

reviews.name: Maja Pedersen
reviews.text: Pragmatic approach — you develop quickly. Great teachers with extensive experience in Hatha/Vinyasa, anatomy and yoga philosophy.

en.visit_title: Book a free info session in Christianshavn
en.visit_lead: Come by and get a feel for the place — we'll tell you about the training, answer questions and help you see how it can fit into your everyday life. The info session takes about 20 minutes.
en.visit1: See the rooms, equipment and the calm of the space
en.visit2: Free mini introduction to the training
en.visit3: Get a clear plan for your next step
en.visit_note: Not based in Copenhagen? We can also hold a short online info session via WhatsApp or FaceTime.
en.visit_img1_alt: Yoga room with warm wooden floor and mats
en.visit_modal_subtitle: Choose a date and time that works for you.
en.faq1_q: Do I need experience to get started?
en.faq1_a: You should have a minimum of 6-12 months of regular yoga practice (2-3 times per week). You should be comfortable with basic postures and be able to complete a 60-minute class.
en.faq2_q: What is the difference between weekday and weekend tracks?
en.faq2_a: The content and certification are identical. The weekday track runs 1-3 days per week from 10-15, while the weekend track is primarily selected weekends from 13-18. You can freely switch between dates.
en.faq3_q: Can I work or study at the same time?
en.faq3_a: Yes, the training is designed for that. Many of our students work full time or study. Expect 15-20 hours per week including classes, homework and personal practice.
en.faq4_q: Is the training Yoga Alliance certified?
en.faq4_a: Yes, we are a registered Yoga Alliance school (RYS-200). You receive RYT-200 certification after graduation — recognized globally.
en.faq5_q: What happens if I get sick?
en.faq5_a: You may miss a maximum of 10% of the hours. We offer make-up sessions, and you can potentially complete with the next program if necessary.
en.faq6_a: Yes — practical teaching exam, written anatomy test and philosophy assignment. Everything is designed for learning, not stress. We have a 90%+ pass rate.
en.final_text: Next 18-week program starts August 10, 2026 — open for enrollment now. Start the Preparation Phase and begin attending classes right away.
en.final_urgency: Secure your place on the autumn cohort
en.more_lead: At Yoga Bible we offer programs that help you progress in your practice — from targeted courses to flexible teacher trainings.
en.more_courses_text: Every month we run focused 4-week programs packaged as 8 × 90-minute workshops (twice a week) — at an affordable price and designed for anyone who wants to deepen their practice step by step.
en.course_inv_blurb: Learn to work safely with handstands, forearm balances and headstands — technique, strength and courage.
en.course_spl_blurb: Flexibility with a system — hip openers, hamstrings and technique for front & middle splits without forcing the body.
en.course_bb_blurb: Healthy backbends focusing on breath, stability and gradual mobility in the thoracic spine and hips.
en.prog4w_blurb: Same Yoga Alliance-certified education — compressed into 4 weeks. Two cohorts: Complete Program (April) and Vinyasa Plus (July).
en.prog4w_list1: April: Multi-style — Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga, Meditation
en.prog4w_list2: July: Vinyasa Plus — 70% Vinyasa Flow + Yin & Hot Yoga
en.prog8w_blurb: Same Yoga Alliance-certified education — spread over 8 weeks with a balanced pace that allows room for integration and everyday life.
en.prog8w_list1: Several days per week with mixed theory and practice
en.prog8w_list2: Time to digest the material between sessions
en.cohort_subtitle: We run two 18-week cohorts per year — spring and autumn. Same training, same certification.
en.cohort_spring_proof_detail: Most started the Preparation Phase weeks before
en.cohort_spring_late_desc: Experienced yogi or already a teacher? Join late — contact us and we'll work out a discount.
en.cohort_spring_workshop_desc: All workshops can be taken individually at 975 DKK per workshop. See the schedule and book.
en.cohort_spring_ended: The spring cohort has ended. See our next cohort below.
en.cohort_autumn_desc: 18 weeks, weekday or weekend track. Start: August 10 · Graduation: December 13, 2026.
en.cohort_autumn_list3: 60 classes included in the Preparation Phase
